creator: mm@FreeBSD.org
text:
I experience hangs of a single ZFS dataset when under low load with samba.
Processes trying to operate on the dataset are stuck in ZFS state ("smbd", "ls", etc.), 
this applies to "zfs umount -f" as well. Other datasets operate without problems.

zfs list, set, etc. work correctly with this dataset.

A hard reset is required to have the system operating again.

This error happened on two systems with different datasets so it is reproducible,
I should try to define how to reproduce it.

How can I help debugging this problem?
